Room.RoomDesc:
1 King Bed

340-sq-foot room with city views


Layout - Separate sitting area

Relax - Fireplace

Internet - Free WiFi and wired Internet access

Entertainment - 42-inch LED TV with premium channels

Food & Drink - Coffee/tea maker, minibar, 24-hour room service, and free bottled water

Sleep - Memory foam bed, Egyptian cotton linens, a down duvet, blackout drapes/curtains, and turndown service

Bathroom - Private bathroom, bathrobes, and a separate bathtub and shower with a rainfall showerhead

Practical - Safe, free newspaper, and iron/ironing board; rollaway/extra beds and free cribs/infant beds available on request

Comfort - Climate-controlled air conditioning and daily housekeeping

Accessibility - Low-height counters and sink, grab bar near toilet, wheelchair-width doorways, wheelchair accessible, and raised toilet seat

Non-Smoking

Connecting/adjoining rooms can be requested, subject to availability

Hotel.Name: Pride Plaza Hotel Aerocity New Delhi
Hotel.Address: 5-A, Hospitality District, Aerocity,Indra Gandhi International Airport,New Delhi,India

Descriptions.Text: Pamper yourself with a visit to the spa, which offers massages. You can take advantage of recreational amenities such as a health club and an outdoor pool. Additional features at this hotel include complimentary wireless Internet access, concierge services, and a fireplace in the lobby.

Enjoy Asian cuisine at Oriental Spice, one of the hotel's 2 restaurants, or stay in and take advantage of the 24-hour room service. Snacks are also available at the coffee shop/café. Relax with your favorite drink at the bar/lounge or the poolside bar. Buffet breakfasts are available daily from 6:00 AM to 10:30 AM for a fee.

Featured amenities include complimentary wired Internet access, a business center, and express check-out. Planning an event in New Delhi? This hotel has facilities measuring 10000 square feet (929 square meters), including conference space. Free valet parking is available onsite.

Treat yourself to a stay in one of the 385 guestrooms, featuring fireplaces and LED televisions. Your memory foam bed comes with down comforters and Egyptian cotton sheets. Complimentary wired and wireless Internet access keeps you connected, and satellite programming provides entertainment. Conveniences include phones, as well as safes and desks.

Distances are displayed to the nearest 0.1 mile and kilometer.

Ambience Mall - 6.6 km / 4.1 mi
Ambience Mall - 7 km / 4.3 mi

Ayyappa Temple - 8.7 km / 5.4 mi
Malai Mandir - 9.4 km / 5.8 mi
Dada Dev Mandir - 9.6 km / 6 mi
Dhaula Kuan - 10.6 km / 6.6 mi

The preferred airport for Pride Plaza Hotel Aerocity New Delhi is Indira Gandhi International Airport (DEL) - 4.2 km / 2.6 mi

With a stay at Pride Plaza Hotel Aerocity New Delhi in New Delhi, you'll be 4.3 mi (7 km) from Ambience Mall and 6.7 mi (10.7 km) from Qutub Minar.  This 5-star hotel is 8.6 mi (13.8 km) from Lodhi Garden and 8.8 mi (14.1 km) from Gurudwara Bangla Sahib.

NearByAttractions.Name: The preferred airport for Pride Plaza Hotel Aerocity New Delhi is Indira Gandhi International Airport (DEL)
